mapper.select: SELECT todo_id, member_id, contents, date, created_at, updated_at, is_checked, is_deleted FROM todos WHERE is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY date DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT todo_id, member_id, contents, date, created_at, updated_at, is_checked, is_deleted FROM todos WHERE todo_id = #{todoId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todos (member_id, contents, date, created_at, is_checked, is_deleted) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{contents}, #{date}, #{createdAt}, #{isChecked}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE todos SET contents = #{contents}, date = #{date}, is_checked = #{isChecked}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE todo_id = #{todoId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE todos SET is_checked = #{isChecked}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE todo_id = #{todoId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT todo_id, member_id, contents, date, created_at, updated_at, is_checked, is_deleted FROM todos WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY date DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT todo_id, member_id, contents, date, created_at, updated_at, is_checked, is_deleted FROM todos WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND date = #{date} AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY created_at ASC
